profile.name: Rodina
profile.title: Blizzard's Sniper Rodina
profile.like: Bears, polar bears, grizzly bears, small bears, large bears
profile.dislike: Those who do not value live
profile.story: The empire's top ranking sniper, and a lover of bears. She likes them so much that she always wears accessories resembling a bear's ears on her hat. So, she'll sometimes hunts tigers, but she'll never shoot a bear. Although her shooting skills are most suitable for assassination, she swore to never use them for unjust reasons. Instead, she uses them to protect others. Currently, she lives with Pavel in the Windland Snow Mountain as his personal guard delegated by the empire.

1.name: Penetration Shot
1.description: Takes aim and prepares to fire. When reused or when preparation is complete, deals [ffc800]1120*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 710.2% ATK[-] P.DMG to enemies in a straight line. DMG increases based on cast time up to [64ff64]150%[-], and at max charge, [fa96fa]knocks enemies down[-].

2.name: Target Aim
2.description:
Increases ATK by [64ff64]135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))[-] and applies [fa96fa][Perfect Aim][-] to the target.

[fa96fa][Perfect Aim][-]: DMG dealt by Rodina is increased by [64ff64]135%[-].

3.name: Focused Fire
3.description: Fires at random enemies, dealing [ffc800]245*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 155% ATK[-] P.DMG [64ffff]10 times[-]. Each shot increases DMG by [64ff64]{3}%[-] and ATK Spd by [64ff64]{4}%[-].

4.name: Rapid Shot
4.description: Deals [ffc800]354*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 224.4% ATK[-] P.DMG [64ffff]{3} times[-] every [64ffff]282982sec[-].

1.IV: Critical Damage of this skill is increased by [64ff64]80%[-].

2.IV: Increases Crit DMG by [64ff64]60%[-] for the duration of Skill.

4.IV: Critical Damage of this skill is increased by [64ff64]80%[-].

light.effect: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage scaling with cast time increases up to 450%.

dark.effect: Immune to status ailments while casting.

light.effect: During the duration, ATK Spd is increased by 150%.
Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the number of targets is increased by 1.

dark.effect: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and effect increase on attack is increased by 100%.

light.effect: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%.

uw.name: Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0
uw.description: On hit, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK, knocks the enemy back, and increases ACC by {1} for 10 sec. This ACC increase stacks up to 3 times and can be triggered once every 4 sec.
uw.story: The essence of the most sophisticated imperial technology. Requiring superhuman precision, this rifle cannot be handled by a regular person. It has been magically enchanted to allow the shooter to see impossibly long distances. Even the greatest scope in the world, however, is useless in the hands of someone who can't aim with it. As such, the performance of this rifle has significantly depended on the skills of its users. Rodina, gifted with superb vision and precise control, is a suitable owner of this rifle. She went one step further and customized it to her preference, naming it Rodina Custom.

1.name: Shock-absorbing Special Guard
1.description: [Penetration Shot] While casting, increases ATK SPD by 80%, and on Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec. This ATK increase stacks up to 2 times.
1.story:
A special shoulder guard that Fluss struggled to get for petite Rodina.
It is very hard and sturdy as it was made with Black Larva leather. It is one of Rodina's favorite items since it has great recoil absorption.

2.name: Crystal Support
2.description: [Target Aim] When Rodina’s target dies, switches to a random enemy and increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec.
2.story:
A sniper rifle support that Pavel made so that it would fit Rodina's small body.
It's made of crystals so it's very firm and sturdy. This support is enough to aim at any target.

3.name: Custom Bullet VII
3.description: [Focused Fire] Increases DMG by {0}%, and the last 2 shots deal DEF-ignoring DMG.
3.story: A barrage that was requested to the legendary blacksmith of the empire. It contains gunpowder made from the sturdy egg of a pitta and the jaw bone of a dragon turtle. It was made small so that Rodina can use it easily, but it has the power to destroy anything.

4.name: Gun Encyclopedia
4.description: [Consecutive Shot] Changes the number of targets to 2, and reduces the target's P.Crit Resist by {0} for 10 sec.
4.story:
A magazine about firearms being issued in the Empire.
Issued regularly by Magos Le'Flamme, this firearms encyclopedia is Rodina's favorite magazine that contains various information about cutting-edge guns and weapons.
Rodina has more faith in this magazine than she does for other magazines because it is edited under the supervision of Chief Director Valance, who Rodina is a big fan of.

sw.description: Summons the soul of Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0 for [64ffff]10sec[-], increasing own Crit DMG by [64ff64]70%[-]. During the duration, every [64ffff]0sec[-], deals [ffc800][DAMAGE][-] P.DMG to an enemy and stuns the target for [64ffff]1sec[-]. If the target is a Boss, the DMG and Stun duration are increased by [64ff64]2%[-].

advancement.2: Becomes immune to CC for 5 sec.

sw.story:
Mod.0 is the most elaborate rifle that the empire has ever created. Among the snipers, Rodina has proven her skills as the ace sniper through the excellent use of the rifle. However, even Rodina misses her shots sometimes.
That is because to successfully hit the target, one does not only need a good sniper and a good weapon, but also other aspects such as good environmental condition, and good calculation.
One can expect success only when ‘the best condition’ has been set through the combination of various factors. Also even then, there is also many uncontrollable odds involved, such as luck.
Rodina did not deny such, and she did not give up. Rodina decided to focus on factors she could control, and improve her skills to the max.
Thus, she went to a snow mountain to improve her concentration. A snow mountain was considered the best place to hone concentration, as it requires extreme concentration to hit a moving target through falling snow, and sight-impairing mist of the snow mountain. Rodina continued honing her skills to meet the goal of her training.
Then one day, Rodina found herself being wrapped by a strange sensation. Even though her sight was impaired due to fatigue, she could somehow see the target clearly.
She pulled the trigger instinctively, and that’s when Rodina detected a crosshair that had appeared in front of the rifle. It was the rifle’s gift to its master who had completed her herculean training.
